HomePage.title: Pergament
HomePage.subtitle: Hello — Bootstrap and localisation are working.

hero.title: Scan a book into a clean EPUB
hero.subtitle: Open this on your phone, photograph each page inside the guide, and we'll email you the finished EPUB.

step1.title: Open on phone
step1.desc: Scan the QR code or open this site on your phone to use the camera.

step2.title: Scan each page
step2.desc: Line up each page inside the guide rectangle, skipping page numbers and margins.

step3.title: Pay & receive
step3.desc: Pay securely via Stripe and receive the finished EPUB in your inbox.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.paymentNote: Payment via Stripe after processing. No account required.

desktop.heading: Continue on your phone
desktop.body: The scanner needs a phone camera. Scan the QR code below or open this URL on your mobile device.

intro.heading: Before you start
intro.warning1: The first photo is the book cover — fit it inside the frame.
intro.warning2: Then capture pages in order, one shot per page.
intro.warning3: Do not include page numbers, headers, or footers.
intro.warning4: Hold the phone flat; good lighting and a steady hand help.

camera.permissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Enable it in your browser settings and reload.
camera.noCamera: No camera available on this device.
camera.insecureContext: The camera is only available over HTTPS (or on localhost). Open this page via a secure URL and try again.

step.coverHint: Start with the book cover. Fit it inside the frame.
step.pageHint: Fit the next page inside the frame.

coverAdjust.title: Adjust cover
coverAdjust.hint: Drag each corner to the edge of the book cover.
coverAdjust.cannotDetect: Couldn't detect the cover automatically — drag the corners to align them.
coverAdjust.cropHint: Drag corners to the edges. Tap Rotate or Re-detect if needed.
coverAdjust.enhanceHint: Adjust tone, then hold the preview to compare.

billing.heading: Billing
billing.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmation.heading: All done
confirmation.body: Payment received. Processing has started. You'll receive your EPUB at {email} shortly.
confirmation.processingBody: Processing your scans into an EPUB. This usually takes a minute or two.
confirmation.emailNote: A copy was also sent to {email}.
confirmation.failedBody: Something went wrong while converting your book. Please contact support with your session ID.
confirmation.expiredBody: Download links are available for 7 days after purchase. Check your email for the copy we sent you.
